name: github-profile-analyzer
description: A production-ready full-stack application featuring a Node.js Express backend API and a React + Tailwind CSS frontend dashboard. The application analyzes GitHub user profiles, calculates repository statistics, and caches insights in a MySQL database.

scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
